query: create a Genie Space for our Maximo data
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-genie-space with maximo-overview as parent
Confirms maximo-setup has run (UC comments registered + workspace glossary generated) before curating

Assembles the four ingredients: general instructions (overview gotchas as rules + glossary synonyms), certified example SQL from in-scope modules, business synonyms, and Trusted Asset metric functions
Bakes universal filters into the general instructions (WOCLASS='WORKORDER', ISTASK=0, SITEID joins, status via SYNONYMDOMAIN, HISTORYFLAG awareness) without re-explaining the rationale
Defers Space create/export/import mechanics to the databricks-genie platform skill and does not re-implement them
Plans a benchmark + Monitoring-tab re-curation pass rather than declaring it done
